name: python3-acstore
title: python3-acstore
summary: implementation to read and write Attribute Container stores (Python 3)
description:
implementation to read and write Attribute Container stores (Python 3)
ACStore, or Attribute Container Storage, provides a stand-alone implementation
to read and write Attribute Container stores, such as Plaso storage files.
.
This package installs the library for Python 3.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-acstore because implementation to read and write Attribute Container stores (Python 3).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-acstore as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-acstore with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-acstore --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
